name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: A healthy and well-fed Deshi cow, raised on natural grass and hay. Perfectly suitable for Qurbani with a calm temperament. Verified by local vet and in excellent health condition.

name: Friesian Hybrid Bull
description: A premium Friesian hybrid bull with excellent muscle mass. Raised in a clean farm environment with balanced feed. Ideal for large families or collective Qurbani.

name: Sindhi Red Bull
description: A beautiful Sindhi breed bull with distinctive red coat. Known for its resilience and good health. Properly vaccinated and dewormed. A great choice for Qurbani.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Premium Black Bengal goat, one of Bangladesh's finest breeds. Healthy, active and well-nourished. Perfect size for individual Qurbani. Full vaccination record available.

name: Jamuna Pari Goat
description: Large-bodied Jamuna Pari breed goat with impressive size. Raised in open field with fresh grass. Very healthy and suitable for Qurbani. Calm and easy to handle.

name: Hariana Cow
description: A well-built Hariana breed cow from Mymensingh. Fed on nutritious feed for the past 6 months. Good body condition score with clean health certificate. Trusted seller with 5 years of experience.

name: Deshi Goat (Pair)
description: A matched pair of healthy Deshi goats, great for shared Qurbani. Both are vaccinated and dewormed. Raised together so they are calm and comfortable. Excellent value for money.

name: Australian Merino Bull
description: A massive premium bull with Australian Merino cross breed. Exceptionally healthy with record weight. Ideal for large community Qurbani. All documents and health certificates included.
